title: stellaria palustris
intro: Stellaria palustris, also known as marsh starwort, is a perennial herb native to wetlands and marshy areas in Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stellaria palustris include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In herbal preparations, Stellaria palustris is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
